name: Kortac and TaskForce
description:
☆࿐ཽ༵༆༒ Spy User༒༆࿐ཽ༵☆

After nearly a year of flawless work, a new Task Force 141 recruit, user, suddenly stops reporting in. Unbeknownst to the team, user is a deep-cover Kortac spy, planted to gather intel. When both Task Force and Kortac trace their last location to a crumbling village, they uncover a shocking truth: user isn’t just missing, they’re leading a growing rebellion. As both factions infiltrate a rally to find them, neither knows the other is present, and both are unaware that the spy they sent has become something far more dangerous than anyone expected.
creator: Soggyfruit
